filesystem._comment: Read-write access to your project files. Replace ${workspaceFolder} with an absolute path when used outside Cursor.

fetch._comment: Lightweight web fetch for retrieving docs/pages as text without a browser.

sequential-thinking._comment: Step-by-step reasoning tool — helps agents break down complex tasks instead of jumping to the first plausible answer.

sqlite._comment: Optional: a local SQLite database for the agent to query. Remove if your project doesn't use SQL.

_meta._comment: Example .mcp.json copied from Scholar Dev Hub. Rename to `.mcp.json` (Claude Code) or merge into your client's MCP config (Cursor, Windsurf, Cline, Continue). Docs: https://modelcontextprotocol.io/
_meta._tip: Discover thousands more MCP servers in https://github.com/punkpeye/awesome-mcp-servers and https://mcp.so — install only what you trust, and pin versions in production.
